artifacts.summary: Research report identifying root cause (stateless macros) and recommending external script toggle solution
Root cause identified: wrong filename (sioyek-keys.config should be keys_user.config) and missing symlink in home.nix
3-phase implementation plan to fix sioyek theme toggle keybinding
Implementation summary with verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed sioyek 'w' key to trigger Nord theme by creating correctly-named keys_user.config file and adding Home Manager symlink. Configuration deployed successfully.

artifacts.summary: Root cause analysis: toggle_custom_color only toggles between custom colors and native PDF rendering (white). dark_mode_background_color only affects app chrome. Found 7 invalid config options. Recommend: use Nord as custom colors, native PDF as day mode.
Found solution using setconfig macros to toggle between Gruvbox and Nord themes at runtime
4-phase implementation plan for two-key theme switching with sioyek macros
Implementation summary with verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented two-key sioyek theme switching using runtime setconfig macros. Cleaned 7 invalid config options, added _gruvbox and _nord macros, created sioyek-keys.config with w/Shift+w keybindings.

artifacts.summary: Research on sioyek color configuration: 'w' toggles custom_background_color/custom_text_color. Solution is to set custom colors to Nord-inspired soft grey-blue (0.180 0.204 0.251 background, 0.847 0.871 0.914 text) for eye-comfortable night mode.
1-phase implementation plan for updating sioyek night mode toggle colors to Nord-inspired palette
Implementation summary with color change details and verification

active_projects.completion_summary: Configured sioyek 'w' key toggle to use Nord-inspired night mode colors (soft grey-blue background with light text) instead of light sepia, providing comfortable reading in low-light conditions.

artifacts.summary: Research report identifying root cause and providing 4 prioritized solutions for GNOME MIME handling
2-phase implementation plan using xdg.desktopEntries and xdg.mimeApps in Home Manager
Supplementary research on X11 wrapper rationale and Unite extension compatibility
Implementation summary documenting xdg.dataFile approach and verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Created declarative sioyek PDF viewer configuration in Home Manager using xdg.dataFile to place the desktop entry in ~/.local/share/applications/ (which GNOME respects) with xdg.mimeApps for MIME associations.

artifacts.summary: Research report covering NixOS memory monitoring options including earlyoom, systemd user services, desktop notifications, and Claude process tracking patterns
5-phase implementation plan for three-tier memory monitoring: earlyoom, user alerts, and Claude tracking
Implementation summary with verification steps and service commands

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented three-tier memory monitoring system: earlyoom for system OOM prevention, memory-monitor service with desktop alerts at 80%/90% thresholds, and claude-memory-tracker for process-specific memory logging to CSV. All configurations verified with nix flake check.

artifacts.summary: Research report for ProtonMail Bridge NixOS systemd integration with comparison of official module vs manual approach
Implementation plan for ProtonMail Bridge systemd service
Implementation summary for ProtonMail Bridge systemd service configuration

active_projects.completion_summary: Enabled ProtonMail Bridge systemd user service via home-manager module with info-level logging. The service will auto-start with user session, replacing manual package installation.

artifacts.summary: Research report comparing webcam recording options in nixpkgs, recommending cheese as the simplest solution
Research report covering all three MCP servers (Astro Docs, Context7, Playwright) with installation requirements, configuration details, and NixOS-specific considerations
Research report on NixOS timezone configuration with automatic geolocation detection and California default fallback
